report.summary: Cycle-close v7 — production stable post-redeploy (babylon-protocol page live); PUBLISH_QUEUE fully drained to 0; 292 pages indexed; Sprint 59 apostrophe blocker and rate-limiting gap still open; Vercel Pro trial now ~6 days.

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ Production stable — build safety net confirmed: ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone
✅ DELTA vs v6: /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES via publish-v7 run — page.tsx exists, metadata confirmed, redeploy triggered (Ede7aPH2k)
✅ PUBLISH_QUEUE now EMPTY — 0 items queued; all pages promoted as of Mar 15 cycle close
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Build 1b4a15e (Sprint 59) still FAILED — unescaped apostrophe in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 ('you're' in single-quoted string); 57 TS errors across 2 files — unchanged from v6
✅ No new TypeScript error sources — same 2 files: AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 errors) and structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors)
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100/292 published pages still missing page.tsx — pre-existing dynamic [slug] route architecture; no regression
✅ No new regressions introduced this cycle — 24 files changed in HEAD~1 batch, none introducing new error sources

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes structurally present and healthy: /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
✅ Ops routes /api/health and /api/cache-stats live (added in 1b4a15e) — health route has rate limiting (checkRateLimit), cache-stats has 5-req limit
✅ Cache TTLs confirmed stable: prices 60s, fear-greed 600s, trending 300s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields dynamic (CACHE_DURATION*2), market-metrics 60s

⚠️ CARRY-OVER: TTL mismatches on 4 routes — fear-greed (s-maxage=600 / revalidate=1200), trending (300/600), market-metrics (60/120), defi-yields (dynamic/dynamic) — minor inconsistencies, no user impact
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting still 0/6 on public data routes — /api/health and /api/cache-stats are the only rate-limited endpoints; security gap on all live data APIs
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data in 2/6 routes (prices partial, market-dominance 4 refs) — 4 routes fully unprotected on total upstream API failure
✅ No rate limit errors, stale-cascade events, or API failures detected this cycle — pipeline clean

sections.title: DevOps
items: ✅ Production running on updated deployment Ede7aPH2k (babylon-protocol redeploy triggered via publish-v7) — site accessible, no error spikes
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Build 1b4a15e (Sprint 59) still FAILED in Vercel — ecosystem/courses routes not live; 1-line AICourseRecommendations.tsx fix unblocks everything
✅ next.config.ts stable — staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone, webpack __dirname fix, ignoreBuildErrors:true all confirmed
✅ Middleware clean — 127 lines, single import (next/server), Edge Runtime compliant; pillar pages include solana-alpenglow-guide and onchain-finance-onfi-guide (added last cycle)
⚠️ URGENT: Vercel Pro trial now ~6 days remaining (down from ~7 in v6) — payment method must be added before expiry to avoid production downgrade
⚠️ Dubai region (dxb1) still unavailable — Vercel auto-routing, no user-facing impact
✅ No new deployment failures or performance regressions observed this cycle

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ PUBLISHED: 292 pages in production (up from 290 in v6 — babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking + correction from v5 accounting)
✅ QUEUE: 0 items in PUBLISH_QUEUE — fully drained as of this cycle close
✅ SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking promoted, PUBLISH_QUEUE drained, Vercel redeploy confirmed

🔴 BLOCKER #1 (Jefe action): Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 — change unescaped apostrophe in 'you're' to `'` or curly-quote — 1-line fix unlocks Sprint 59 (176 dApps + courses hub) reaching production
⚠️ BLOCKER #2 (Jefe action): Add Vercel payment method within 6 days — Pro trial expiry imminent, production risk if downgraded
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting 0/6 public data routes — outstanding since Sprint 38, rising risk as organic traffic grows
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data 2/6 routes (partial) — resilience gap ahead of organic traffic window
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100 pages in published-pages.ts without page.tsx — dynamic route architecture, audit still deferred
📌 NEXT CYCLE PLAN: No pages to publish (queue empty) — focus should shift to (1) Sprint 59 unblock fix, (2) rate limiting sprint, (3) new content/tools for queue refill
